title: Ploy Gradle Trimmer Evidence
description: Schema for structured Gradle build-gate trimmer evidence forwarded as /in/errors.yaml.
$comment: Gradle compile-java evidence uses compact file references: line number is encoded as path suffix ':<line>'.

task.$comment: Gradle task name for compile-java evidence. When present, expected to be compileJava.

version.$comment: Plugin version for plugin-apply failures when present.

base.$comment: Common base directory for all files in this error. When present, files[].path is relative to this base.

snippet.$comment: Common snippet hoisted from files[].snippet when all file snippets in this error are identical and non-empty.

path.$comment: File path. For compile-java diagnostics, line is encoded as '<path>:<line>'. Path may be relative when error.base is provided.

snippet.$comment: Per-file snippet when snippets are not hoisted to error.snippet.
